metadata.title: Hive Minded
metadata.description: The Hive Minded is created and hosted by Staci Costopoulos, creator of The Bitcoin Nova.The Hive Minded is a Bitcoin hangout. Real conversations, reactions, ...
metadata.profileDescription: Hive Minded is Staci Costopoulos's Bitcoin roundtable and reaction channel, built around live hangs, sharp commentary, laughter, and group energy with people deep in the Bitcoin space. It extends The Bitcoin Nova ecosystem with raw conversation, community signal, and grassroots connection instead of polished talking points.

metadata.title: The Bitcoin Nova Podcast
metadata.description: Staci hosts grounded conversations about Bitcoin, communities, culture, and the people building a better future.

metadata.title: The Bitcoin Nova Podcast
metadata.description: Staci drives Bitcoin education through raw, human centered conversation. Known for translating real world moments into clear, relatable insights on Bitcoin adoption and self custody, she brings clarity without jargon or fear. As host of The Bitcoin Nova Podcast, Staci delivers thoughtful, unfiltered interviews focused on Bitcoin, energy, sovereignty, and the future of money. Her work emphasizes honest dialogue, community engagement, and practical understanding over noise. Staci is also active in grassroots Bitcoin advocacy and regularly supports community discussions and educational spaces.
